description.english: Played doctor with an old computer.
Got the photographer and influencer on board.
description.german: Fotografin und Influencerin ins Boot gebracht.

description.english: Read the news of the first day.

description.german: Den Mühlstein wieder zum Drehen gebracht.

description.english: Cracked a code and stole a life vest.
Read the news of the second day.
Got Pietro’s boat back in shape.
Creatively bypassed a vow of silence.
Overcame a high‑security door and stole a key.
description.german: Eine Hochsicherheitstür überwunden und einen Schlüssel gestohlen.

description.english: Made a lot of smoke about nothing.
Read the news of the third day.

description.german: Platten an die richtige Stelle geschoben

description.english: Found and used the back entrance.

description.german: Licht in der Gruft wieder hergestellt.

description.english: Saved Thea at the very last moment.
Drove the elevator to the brink of rage.
description.german: Easter Egg: Den Lift zur Weißglut gebracht.
Easter Egg: Jemand zum Moonwalken gebracht.

description.english: Easter Egg: Fell into the water multiple times.
description.german: Easter Egg: Mehrfach ins Wasser gefallen.

description.english: Easter Egg: Drove Viola up the wall.
description.german: Easter Egg: Viola zum Austicken gebracht.

description.english: Easter Egg: Searched through an archive volume.
Easter Egg: Drove a monk into a mama’s arms
description.german: Easter Egg: Mönch in die Arme einer Mama getrieben

description.english: Instantly recognizes the German musical scale.
Detects subtle phantom pulses with exceptional accuracy.
Spots auditory irregularities in spoken language.
Completely unfazed by scratching sounds on chalkboards.
description.german: Hat kein Problem mit Kratzen auf Tafeln

description.english: Detects even the smallest interruptions in complex sound environments.
description.german: Hört selbst kleinste Unterbrechungen in Tönen.

description.english: Thea quotes the famous love scene from Casablanca.
description.german: Thea zitiert die Liebesszene in Casablanca.
Thea zitiert den Soldaten Johnny Rico.

description.english: Thea quotes a well‑known little gnome.
description.german: Thea zitiert einen bekannten kleinen Gnom.

description.english: Thea quotes Jen Hur. Or is it Ben Hur?
description.german: Thea zitiert Jen Hur. Oder ist es Ben Hur?

description.english: Thea quotes a creepy nightmare figure.
Thea quotes a famous adventure game series.
Thea quotes a famous pirouette‑spinning dancer.
description.german: Thea zitiert eine berühmte, pirouettendrehende Tänzerin.

description.english: Thea quotes a famous time‑travel scientist.
Thea quotes a famous film about gorillas in the mist.
description.german: Thea zitiert einen berühmten Film mit Gorillas im Nebel.

description.english: Thea confirms: You can pet the dog!
description.german: Thea bestätigt: You can pet the dog!
